scripts.build:packages: pnpm -F @garage/crypto build && pnpm -F @garage/bucket-api-server build && pnpm -F @garage/tokens build && pnpm -F @garage/ui build
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api build && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api lint && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api lint:fix && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api format && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web format
scripts.format:check: pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api format:check && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web format:check
scripts.test: pnpm -F @garage/bucket-api-server test:run && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api test:run && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/web test:run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -F @garage/crypto typecheck && pnpm -F @garage/bucket-api-server typecheck && pnpm -C garage-admin-console/api typecheck && pnpm -C s3-browser/api typecheck
